journaling-companion.name: Journaling Companion
journaling-companion.description: Surprise photo prompts at random times — helps you stay mindful and lets the agent get to know you better.

sleeping-coach.description: Sleep coaching powered by Oura Ring — morning reports and evening wind-down advice.

tech-bro-digest.description: Daily digest of tech news from configurable sources and topics.

personal-reminder.description: Schedule one-time or recurring reminders delivered via message.

notetaker.name: Notetaker
notetaker.description: Capture thoughts, links, and ideas — get the most relevant one surfaced daily.

fabric.description: Sync interactions from various platforms via Fabric — proactive check-ins and user profiling.
